persona: Shopify D2C brand ops lead, post-purchase satisfaction weekly loop
prompt_to_designer: Email every customer 7 days post-delivery. Ask NPS + one open-ended. If they pick a NPS ≤ 6 or ≥ 9, offer to switch to a 3-minute voice call. Roll up to a weekly brand dashboard.
expected_outline_topics: one thing that would have made it better

sample_answers.text: The unboxing — the note from the founder felt personal, not templated.
Shipping took 8 days and I couldn't track it after day 3.
Yes, already planning a gift order for my sister.

expected_themes: unboxing is the top NPS driver — founder note stands out
shipping tracking gap between day 3 and delivery hurts NPS
high repeat-purchase intent even among 7/10 raters
voice opt-in rate on NPS ≥ 9 is meaningfully higher than ≤ 6
sentiment agrees with NPS score ≥ 85% — safe for auto-flagging
